projects.title: Worker Agent Toolkit
projects.tagline: A framework for building AI agents that orchestrate GPU workers on RunPod.
projects.description:
The Worker Agent Toolkit provides a high-level abstraction for creating AI agents that can dynamically provision, manage, and orchestrate GPU workers on RunPod's infrastructure.

## Features

- **Dynamic Scaling** — Agents automatically spin up and tear down GPU workers based on demand
- **Task Routing** — Intelligent routing of inference tasks to the most appropriate worker type
- **Cost Optimization** — Built-in strategies for balancing performance and cost
- **MCP Integration** — Expose your agents as Model Context Protocol servers

## Getting Started

Install the toolkit and configure your RunPod API key to get started. The agent framework handles the rest — from provisioning workers to managing their lifecycle.

```bash
npm install @runpod-labs/worker-agent-toolkit
```

projects.title: GPU Benchmark Arena
projects.tagline: Compare GPU performance across models and workloads in real-time.
projects.description:
GPU Benchmark Arena lets you run standardized AI benchmarks across different GPU types available on RunPod and compare their performance side-by-side.

## What It Does

- Run inference benchmarks on any GPU type (A100, H100, RTX 4090, etc.)
- Compare tokens/second, time-to-first-token, and throughput
- Community-contributed benchmark profiles for popular models
- Historical tracking of performance over time

## Why

Choosing the right GPU for your workload shouldn't require guesswork. This tool gives you real data from real hardware.

projects.title: Vibe Coder
projects.tagline: An AI coding agent that runs on RunPod GPUs with full environment access.
projects.description:
Vibe Coder is an experimental AI coding agent that gets its own GPU-powered sandbox environment on RunPod. Give it a task, and it writes code, runs it, debugs it, and iterates — all on cloud GPUs.

## How It Works

1. Describe what you want to build
2. Vibe Coder provisions a RunPod workspace with the right GPU and tools
3. It writes, executes, and iterates on the code autonomously
4. You review the results and provide feedback

## Stack

- Claude as the reasoning engine
- RunPod Serverless for GPU compute
- Docker containers for isolated environments
- Real-time streaming of agent activity
